faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our proxy gateway and residential network.
faqs.a1: Residential proxies are IP addresses provided by internet service providers (ISPs) to real homeowners. They are highly trusted and less likely to be flagged or blacklisted by websites compared to data center IPs.
faqs.q2: How does the rotating proxy work?
faqs.a2: Our system allows you to either rotate your IP address on every request automatically or hold the same IP address for a 'sticky' session (configurable up to 60 minutes) for tasks that require persistence.
faqs.a3: Yes! You can target specific countries, states, cities, or ASNs. Location targeting is included in all plans without extra charge.
faqs.q4: Do you offer a free trial?
faqs.a4: Yes, we offer a 3-day trial plan with 500MB of residential bandwidth for verified business accounts to test integration compatibility.
faqs.a5: We support HTTP, HTTPS, and SOCKS5 proxy protocols, ensuring compatibility with all major scraping tools and software.
about.title: Bypassing Limits, Empowering Data
about.subtitle: Learn how we built the world's most reliable residential and mobile proxy infrastructure.
about.story_desc: We believe that data access should be open and borderless. We started in 2024 to solve IP blockades and rate limits for developers and enterprises, providing ethically sourced proxy nodes with exceptional speed.
about.tech_desc: Our proprietary proxy engine dynamically routes traffic across thousands of concurrent micro-tunnels. The smart gateway automatically detects latency spikes and rotates connections to guarantee 99.9% uptime.
